id.description: Unique URL-friendly slug for the university, e.g. boston-university

name.description: The official name of the university

country.description: Country where the university is located, e.g. USA, UK, Canada

location.description: City and state/region of the university, e.g. Boston, MA

logo.description: URL to the university's logo image

about.description: A detailed, counselor-grade paragraph about the university, its reputation, and suitability for international students

national.description: National ranking in the home country

studentFacultyRatio.description: The ratio of students to faculty members, e.g. 10:1

internationalStudents.description: Percentage of international students in the student body, e.g. 24%

type.description: Whether the university is a Public or Private institution

foundedYear.description: The year the university was established

applicationFee.description: Cost to apply for admission, e.g. $95 USD

scholarships.description: Details about funding, merit-based scholarships, and assistantships available to international students

avgTuition.description: Average tuition fee in USD per year for international students, e.g. 66000

popularCourses.description: Key fields of study the university is famous for

id.description: Unique identifier for the program, e.g. bu-cs-ms

name.description: Official name of the degree program

duration.description: Standard duration of the course, e.g. 2 years, 1-2 years

tuition.description: Program-specific tuition fee in USD per year

about.description: Brief description of the program and its highlights

school.description: The specific graduate school offering the program, e.g. Ira A. Fulton Schools of Engineering

isSTEM.description: Indicates whether the program qualifies for the STEM OPT extension

applyLink.description: Direct URL to the official program application page

toeflScore.description: Minimum required TOEFL score, e.g. 90+ iBT

greScore.description: Required GRE criteria or status, e.g. Not Required, Required

gmatScore.description: Required GMAT criteria or status, e.g. Not Required, 710+

duolingoScore.description: Minimum required Duolingo English Test score, e.g. 120+

pteScore.description: Minimum required Pearson Test of English score, e.g. 60+

gpa.description: Recommended or minimum GPA required, e.g. 3.0+

insights.description: Admissions counselor insights or competitive tips for applicants

sellingPoints.description: Key bullet points emphasizing benefits of studying this program

programs.description: List of postgraduate programs offered by the university
